commands.command: pnpm exec vitest run src/lib/synaipse/context-contract.test.ts src/lib/synaipse/state.test.ts src/commands/next.test.ts --reporter=dot

commands.evidence: Emitted harness-decision/v1 with read-only top-level recommendation effects and synaipse-state/v1 invocationEffects whose three mutation booleans were false.

findings.summary: Strict state-v1 cannot carry the required nine-code failure taxonomy without a versioned migration because contextUnknowns requires identified ch_context IDs and one of three legacy reasons.
findings.remediation: Use the separately versioned meta.synaipseContextFailures decision-envelope contract while retaining the constrained state-v1 projection during a compatibility window.

findings.summary: HarnessDecision recommendation flags and nested SynaipseState invocationEffects represent distinct effect domains and must not be conflated.
findings.remediation: In separately admitted CC1, add a named versioned recommendation-effects projection sourced from the existing permission plan without redefining v1 fields.

claims_boundary: Accepted only as a packet-bound local CC0 mapping decision and focused local-command evidence at target SHA 6a022f6d805139bebb18d16776b6a041445c1522. It does not prove a new runtime or schema contract, package compatibility, canary behaviour, hosted CI, review, acceptance, merge, release, or readiness. CC1 and CC2 remain blocked pending fresh QA Disproof and Adversarial Review.
